# cce-ruby — Code Context Engine (Ruby implementation)

> A local, offline-by-default CLI that indexes a code repository (AST-chunks
> files with tree-sitter, embeds each chunk, stores a vector + BM25 keyword
> index + import graph on disk in SQLite) and answers queries with hybrid
> vector + BM25 + Reciprocal Rank Fusion retrieval. A clean-room, test-first
> Ruby implementation of a shared specification (SPEC v1.0, plus the v1.1
> dashboard/observability addendum); a sibling Rust implementation is built from
> the identical spec.

## Start here

- [README](README.md): What CCE is, provenance, quickstart, commands, and a map to the docs.
- [SPEC.md](SPEC.md): The authoritative specification — the source of truth for every behaviour.
- [Getting started](docs/getting-started.md): Install → first successful index and search, self-serve.
- [How-to recipes](docs/how-to.md): Task recipes — index, search, benchmark, conformance, Ollama.

## Design and decisions

- [Architecture](docs/architecture.md): Design goals, component/pipeline model, rationale, and where the design strains.
- [Dashboard & observability](docs/dashboard.md): The v1.1 metrics pipeline (log → pure aggregator → API → self-contained page), event schema, and aggregation formulas.
- [Decisions](docs/DECISIONS.md): Every spec ambiguity resolved during implementation, with rationale.
- [TDD log](docs/TDD.md): The test-first build order, final test count, and coverage.
- [Benchmarks](docs/BENCHMARKS.md): Headline retrieval-quality and latency numbers.

## Working in this repo

- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): Instructions for AI agents — the gates, test discipline, and the no-conformance-drift rule.
- [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md): Dev setup, the `bundle exec rake test` gate, quality gates, and PR conventions.

## Key source files

- [bin/cce](bin/cce): The executable entry point; delegates to CCE::CLI.
- [lib/cce/cli.rb](lib/cce/cli.rb): Argument parsing and command dispatch (index/search/stats/bench/conformance).
- [lib/cce/retriever.rb](lib/cce/retriever.rb): The hybrid retrieval pipeline (intent → RRF → confidence → penalty → diversity → graph).
- [lib/cce/chunker.rb](lib/cce/chunker.rb): Tree-sitter AST chunking, import extraction, deterministic chunk id.
- [lib/cce/store.rb](lib/cce/store.rb): SQLite persistence of chunks, vectors, imports, whole-file token counts, and embedder metadata.
- [lib/cce/numeric_format.rb](lib/cce/numeric_format.rb): The determinism choke point — rounding, fixed-6 formatting, canonical sort.
- [lib/cce/metrics_aggregator.rb](lib/cce/metrics_aggregator.rb): The v1.1 PURE aggregate function (totals, north-stars, daily series) — the cross-language dashboard anchor.
- [lib/cce/dashboard_server.rb](lib/cce/dashboard_server.rb): The v1.1 loopback-only, read-only, self-contained WEBrick dashboard server.

Note: the metrics/dashboard subsystem (`lib/cce/metrics*.rb`, `lib/cce/dashboard*.rb`) is the ONE place CCE uses wall-clock time and randomness (`ts`/`id`/`generated_ts`); both are injected so tests stay deterministic, and the aggregator itself is pure.

## Optional

- [License (MIT)](LICENSE): MIT © 2026 David Silva.
- [Security policy](SECURITY.md): Threat model (untrusted parsed input; localhost-only opt-in network; loopback-only read-only self-contained dashboard) and private reporting.
- [Changelog](CHANGELOG.md): Keep a Changelog format; 1.1.0 dashboard/observability, 1.0.0 initial release.
